quicksight.topic.dataaggregation.CfnAbou: The definition of a data aggregation.

quicksight.topic.dataaggregation.Dataset.Description: The level of time precision that is used to aggregate `DateTime` values.
quicksight.topic.dataaggregation.Dataset.Allowed values: DAY | HOUR | MINUTE | MONTH | QUARTER | SECOND | WEEK | YEAR

quicksight.topic.dataaggregation.Default.Description: The column name for the default date.
